findings.description: PDF page footer text is repeated inline between content sections in the HTML, disrupting reading flow.
findings.evidence: The footer block 'State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries | 3441 Arendell Street | P.O. Box 769 | Morehead City, North Carolina 28557 | 252-726-7021' appears multiple times within the HTML body between proclamation sections (e.g., between Sections II/III and IV), whereas in the PDF these are page-bottom footers separate from the content flow.

findings.description: A spurious image with empty alt text (alt="") is inserted between Section III (GEAR RESTRICTIONS) and Section IV (GENERAL INFORMATION). There is no corresponding substantive image at that location in the PDF — it appears to be a conversion artifact (possibly a captured page footer/separator from the PDF page break between pages 1 and 2).
findings.evidence: HTML: placed between III.B TRAWLS content and IV. GENERAL INFORMATION heading. PDF has no substantive image at that location — only a page break between pages 1 and 2.
